case_title: MARTINO, PHILIP vs. PRESCOTT, GORDON et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MARTINO, PHILIP AS TO DEFENDANT PRESCOTT, GORDON DOES 1 THROUGH 10 SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          JUL-22-1993 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAY-24-1993 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       JUL-02-1993

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF JUL-22-1993, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON JUL-22-1993, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE & STATUS CONFERENCE STATMENT HEARING SET FOR SEP-07-1993 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE

calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-31-1993 Sweep; Adjudicated

STATUS CONFERENCE
